The '''Ithullans''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ithull]]. As natives of the [[Stenness Node]], they were one of the 25 species collectively called "[[Nessie]]s".

Two-hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] [[Mandalorian–Ithullan war|waged war]] against the Ithullans and nearly wiped them out. By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], there were very few Ithullans left, and only a few scattered members of the Ithullan race could be found wandering the streets of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Both the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm]] and [[Dyyz Nataz]] were known to wear Ithullan armor.

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Ithullan armor worn by Dyyz Nataz identifies the Ithullans as humanoids, though their physical appearance is unknown.
